name: Pinto Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Place sorted beans in a Dutch oven. Cover with water 2 inches above the beans and let soak for 8 hours.
2. Drain the beans thoroughly.
3. In the same pot, cover the beans again with water to about 2 inches above them. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 2 hours or until tender. Add salt during the last 30 minutes of cooking.
4. Drain and cool the beans. Coarsely mash them.
5. Stir oats and the next six ingredients into the mashed beans. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
6. Shape the mixture into 16 patties.
7. In a bowl, mix together flour and cornmeal.
8. Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook the patties in batches, turning them 3-4 minutes on each side, adding more oil as needed.
9. Serve on hamburger buns with your choice of condiments (ketchup, mustard, mayo, lettuce, tomato, onion, pickles, etc.).
